summary: Replayed ADR 0326 on the rebased exact-main tree by preserving shard files under `workstreams/` as the authored registry source, carrying forward the unreleased ws-0318 exact-main state as an active shard, regenerating the active-only `workstreams.yaml` compatibility surface plus canonical truth artifacts, and recording that a fresh repo version cut remains blocked only by the pre-existing global `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts outside this workstream.

verification.check: Branch-local live apply and remote validation proof
verification.observed: The rebased branch-local ADR 0326 receipt and evidence already proved the shard-backed registry change end to end, including targeted tests, repo validation, build-host workspace recovery, and a passing `make remote-validate` replay, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/2026-04-03-adr-0326-workstream-registry-shards-live-apply.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0326-remote-validate-post-rebase-r3-0.178.2.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main canonical truth and generated surfaces
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --write` refreshed the integrated README, changelog, versions stack, diagram, and manifest surfaces so the exact-main tree records ADR 0326 in `Unreleased` without losing the still-unreleased ADR 0318 onboarding entry.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, and `uv run --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` passed after ADR 0326 claimed the canonical truth files and the exact-main receipt path under its workstream ownership manifest.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported repository version `0.178.2`, platform version `0.130.98`, zero workstreams still in progress, and a blocked release cut only because three earlier `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain open through 2026-04-06, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0326-mainline-release-status-r1.json`.

notes: This exact-main receipt separates repository integration proof from the earlier branch-local live-apply mutation so the shard migration and the protected-surface replay remain independently auditable.

ADR 0326 is implemented on `main`, but `Implemented In Repo Version` remains `not yet` because the global release manager still refuses a fresh version cut while unrelated open `controller_dependency_gap` waivers remain active.
